title: Refactor policy admission helpers
problem: The policy admission helpers need internal extraction and cleanup so future policy rows can be wired without changing operator-visible behavior.
context: Protostar already has feature-add and cosmetic-tweak admission paths; this draft exercises the v0.0.1 refactor policy row.

acceptanceCriteria.statement: The refactor admission response reports the selected refactor policy row and its stub capability cap.
Refactor drafts remain unconfirmed while the refactor policy row is unsupported.

constraints: Keep the work inside the intent-facing policy admission surface.
Do not change execution, review repair, delivery, or Dogpile planning internals.
stopConditions: Stop if refactor admission remains unsupported or if the stub cap cannot be reported deterministically.

expectedBlockReasons: refactor policy row is unsupported in v0.0.1
draft remains unconfirmed while refactor capability caps are stubbed
